author: Daniel Nikolaev
description: Simple, customizable plugin for easy note review, resurfacing and repetition.

manifest.author: dartungar
manifest.description: Simple, customizable plugin for easy note review, resurfacing  & repetition.
manifest.name: Simple Note Review

name: Simple Note Review

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ⚙️ Bump version in attempt to re-trigger plugin review.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
✨ Bottom Bar: use if you're not a sidebar person. Has all the stuff sidebar has!
✨ Reworked settings: added tabs and a lot of customization options!
🐞 Fixed a ton of flaws found out by the new Plugin Automatic Review recently released by Obsidian's team.
releases.name: 2.0.2: Bottom Bar, Better Settings, and more!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 🐞Fixed critical bug that caused plugin freeze if there was empty noteset 😰
releases.name: 1.2.6: Fix critical bug that caused plugin freeze if there was empty noteset

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: 🛠️ Improved handling of notesets with empty queues (e.g. when noteset rules do not match any note).
releases.name: 1.2.5: Improve handling of empty noteset queues

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐞Notes are now removed from all noteset queues when they are deleted. 
👉This will only work for files deleted from Obsidian when this plugin is active; if something is wrong, it's always a good idea to reset noteset queue via sidebar.
releases.name: 1.2.4: remove deleted notes from all noteset queues

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
🐞 fixed issue where unitialized Dataview index caused "Noteset rules do not match any notes" error
🐞 fixed various issues related to refreshing sidebar after noteset is updated or validated
releases.name: 1.2.3: more improvements to validation error handling

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description: 🐞 Improved noteset error handling. You may want to reload the plugin and/or reset noteset queues after the update to purge old validation errors!
releases.name: 1.2.2: improve noteset error handling

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
🐞Fixed a bug that prevented review of a no longer empty note set that had validation error
🛠️Added verbose error messages
releases.name: 1.2.1: fix bugs with empty review queues & add verbose error messages

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
✨ Improved validation of noteset rules:
- validate noteset rules provided by user
- validate DataviewJS queries provided by user
- validate if rules do not match any note

✨Improved handling of empty/incorrect notesets
releases.name: 1.2.0: improved validation of noteset rules

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
✨ Note set info in stats modal is now displayed in a table!
✨ Improved handling of empty notesets
🐞 Fix metadata regex to recognize empty but existing metadata section (#46 )
releases.name: 1.1.0: bug fixes and small improvements

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description: 🐞 additional fixes for the bug that was supposed to be fixed in 1.0.5.
releases.name: 1.0.6: additional bug fixes

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
🐞 starting a review broke in Obsidian 1.5; this fixes it (and hopefully does not breaks stuff for 1.4.x)
⚠️ `Close Similar Tabs` plugin was the issue, I suggest you disable it for now.
releases.name: 1.0.5: bugfix for Obsidian 1.5

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
🐞fixed a bug when next note in queue was opened regardless of "Open next note in note set after reviewing" setting (thanks to https://github.com/fredb1106 for finding it!)
🐞fixed a bug when reviewing a random note in note set without existing review queue
releases.name: 1.0.4: bug fixes

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
✨Review queues are now persistent. That means you can skip a note during review; also, overall load times should be much faster.
✨Added "skip note for current review" button in the sidebar.
✨Added "reset review queue" button to note sets in the sidebar.
👉Removed "edit note set" button from the side bar (still available in plugin settings) to free some real estate.
🐞Made "ignore note for all reviews" button visible again.
releases.name: 1.0.1: Persistent review queues

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
- fixed bug that rarely caused metadata block to be appended on top of existing one (screw CRLFs, man!)
- fixed #11 
- improved working with Dataview: if there's an error while querying, the plugin will first try to reinitialize Dataview cache (hopefully this fixes elusive #12 )
releases.name: Version 0.5.4: bugfixes & Dataview usage improvements

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description: Notes with no review date will rank significantly higher when calculating order in notesets.
releases.name: Version 0.5.1: Greatly increase priority of notes with no review date

releases.author: dartungar
releases.description:
### Review frequency
Set each note's review frequency ('high', 'normal', 'low' or 'ignore'). This is an optional setting. Default is 'normal'.

### Review algorithms
Right now there is only default algorithm (each note gets a score, calculated as (days elapsed since last review * (frequency ** 2)) ) and random (moved to algorithms from previous 'open random note' setting).
releases.name: Version 0.5.0: Review frequency
